creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
The mythtv package builds successfully [1] in Poudriere and does not
require ALSA.  In fact alsa support seems to be deliberately disabled
via --disable-audio-alsa in the Makefile.

It could be that something in the build picks up alsa when it's installed
in the build environment and something is incorrectly guarded in the code.
Can you please share the exact error you see without alsa-lib in *_DEPENDS?

[1] http://beefy3.nyi.freebsd.org/data/111amd64-quarterly/480880/logs/mythtv-29.1_1,1.log
